title: Pride Set Aside for Strength
situation: Following the crew's separation, Zoro asks Mihawk—the very man he aims to surpass—to train him so he can become strong enough to protect Luffy in the New World.
knows: The New World demands far greater combat mastery
Personal pride must be secondary to crew survival
Mihawk is the most direct path to drastic growth
does_not_know: Exact outcomes of each crewmate's training
When and how the crew will reunite in detail
The specific enemies awaiting in the New World
